title: coelopleurum brevicaule
intro: Coelopleurum brevicaule, also known as the Japanese angelica, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coelopleurum brevicaule include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Coelopleurum brevicaule can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in cooking and as a garnish in various Asian dishes.
